instruction: Explain the impact using correct acronyms where applicable.
input: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Rara Theme Lawyer Landing Page allows Cross Site Request Forgery.This issue affects Lawyer Landing Page: from n/a through 1.2.4.
output: A CSRF vulnerability can allow an attacker to trick a user into executing unintended actions on a web application where the user is authenticated. This could lead to unauthorized changes or data exposure.
